Risk scores for different enrollment categories are renormalized separately; ESRD risk scores are renormalized to the ESRD population, disabled risk scores are renormalized to the disabled population, aged/dual risk scores are renormalized to the aged/dual population, and aged/non-dual risk scores are renormalized to the aged/non-dual population.
